name: Security report
about: Report a security or privacy issue (consider private disclosure first)

labels: security
assignees: spatchava
---

> ⚠️ **Please do not file public issues for high-severity security vulnerabilities.**
> Email the maintainers privately first. See [`SAFETY.md`](../../SAFETY.md) and
> [`PRIVACY.md`](../../PRIVACY.md) for the disclosure policy.

## Summary

Describe the issue at a high level.

## Affected surface

- [ ] Android app (`:app`)
- [ ] Wear OS (`:wear`)
- [ ] Backend / Supabase / Edge Functions
- [ ] Auth / RLS policy
- [ ] Location-fuzzing / verification logic

## Impact

Confidentiality / integrity / availability impact, plus likely affected user data
(matches, messages, location, identity).

## Reproduction

Minimal steps. Redact PII.

## Suggested mitigation

Optional.
